title: mariscus aromaticus
intro: Mariscus aromaticus, also known as Cymbopogon nardus, is a tropical grass plant native to Sri Lanka and other parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is commonly known as citronella grass, which is valued for its essential oils that possess various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mariscus aromaticus include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving pain and fever, and improving digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Mariscus aromaticus is used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or inhaled to reap its benefits.
